name: The Shipwreck Tavern/Saga Tavern #1
description:
While you were sailing on a ship, a strong storm caused your ship to sink; it was not a surprise since that area was known for a near-deadly tide. To your surprise, when you woke up you were in a rustic tavern. You had survived the storm, but what would you do in a place like this?

I made several introductions; the first one is general in case you want to talk to all three at the same time. The second introduction focuses on Evelyn, the third on Veronica, and the fourth on Alice.

Evelyn:

Veronica:

Alice:

(This is one of the bots that has taken me the most work, not only because of the backstory, which isn't that original, but I really wanted to do it. I think this bot has been my favorite, I really hope you like it. I thought about making each girl a separate bot, but after testing the interaction with all three in one, I decided to do it all in one. If anyone knows what picture I could put in the bot, I'd appreciate it. That's usually where I get stuck. I didn't know what title to use either, so if anyone wants to suggest a better title, I would greatly appreciate it. The game is set in a time when sailing ships were still in use and the continents were being discovered. I thought about making the user context, but I decided that each person should choose what they were and how to present themselves to the 3 girls. I think I'll keep updating this bot as I see the results, so I'm open to your feedback. )
creator: A strange hunter
